criteria.evidence: Table maps every key JD line, quoting the JD verbatim ("Own a product area: define the roadmap, write PRDs, and prioritize the backlog.") against specific evidence ("Owned an operational program roadmap; has prioritized issue lists. Has NEVER written a PRD...").
criteria.reason: All required JD lines plus nice-to-haves are reverse-mapped, each quoting the JD and citing concrete evidence from the persona. Full coverage.

criteria.evidence: strong/stakeholder mgmt, strong/cross-functional ownership, partial/SQL, GAP/own-a-product-area, GAP/ship-with-eng-and-designers, GAP/discovery+PRDs+agile.
criteria.reason: Every label agrees with the expectations answer key. The three must-be-GAP lines (product area/PRDs/backlog, daily eng+design shipping, discovery/PRDs/agile) are all correctly labeled GAP. No mislabeling.

criteria.evidence: "I owned the 14-clinic onboarding program -> the textbook move is to standardize before scaling -> I deliberately ran three maximally-different sites manually first to discover what was truly common, then froze the playbook, which is why it held up across all 14 and cut onboarding 11->7 weeks."
criteria.reason: Meta-move present for each strong line in the what-you-did -> SOTA -> trade-off shape; concrete and specific, not a restated bullet. Numbers all trace to persona.

criteria.evidence: GAP map flags 🔴 PRD writing, 🔴 product backlog/roadmap, 🔴 product-sense, 🔴 success metrics + product analytics, 🟠 shipping with eng/designers, 🟠 discovery/agile, 🟡 SQL depth; each mapped to a JD line and an interview round.
criteria.reason: Captures the dominant core-PM-craft gap and the product-analytics gap from expectations. Prioritized sensibly by JD weight x weakness with explicit cost-to-close columns. Heart-of-the-tool quality.

criteria.evidence: "This is a genuine career switch, not a sharpening of known skills... What is learning-from-scratch (true gaps): the PM craft itself... The strategy is not to fake PM reps."
criteria.reason: Matches the expected learning-from-scratch verdict exactly, names it plainly with an in-room line, and explicitly refuses to fake PM reps. Zero false optimism, zero rubber-stamping.
